rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract definitions.
generic_rules: Input envelope assumptions should reference visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Output guarantees must relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using implementation-only paths.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for equation declarations in AGREE: eq var_name : type = expression;
Wrap AGREE annex content in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Formulate range assumptions using named constants or visible relations.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
